query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS game_center_games (
  id INT PRIMARY KEY AUTO_INCREMENT,
  name VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
  slug VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL UNIQUE,
  description TEXT,
  gameType ENUM('strategy', 'puzzle', 'word', 'card', 'board', 'trivia', 'mystery', 'educational') NOT NULL,
  ageGroup ENUM('k_5', '6_8', '9_12', 'adult', 'all_ages') DEFAULT 'all_ages' NOT NULL,
  minPlayers INT DEFAULT 1 NOT NULL,
  maxPlayers INT DEFAULT 2 NOT NULL,
  estimatedDuration VARCHAR(50),
  skillsTargeted JSON,
  tokenRewardBase INT DEFAULT 10,
  isActive BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE NOT NULL,
  icon VARCHAR(50),
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS game_matches (
  id INT PRIMARY KEY AUTO_INCREMENT,
  gameId INT NOT NULL,
  matchType ENUM('solo', 'vs_ai', 'vs_player', 'tournament') DEFAULT 'solo' NOT NULL,
  status ENUM('waiting', 'in_progress', 'completed', 'abandoned') DEFAULT 'waiting' NOT NULL,
  player1Id INT,
  player2Id INT,
  winnerId INT,
  player1Score INT DEFAULT 0,
  player2Score INT DEFAULT 0,
  gameState JSON,
  startedAt TIMESTAMP NULL,
  completedAt TIMESTAMP NULL,
  tokensAwarded INT DEFAULT 0,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS game_tournaments (
  id INT PRIMARY KEY AUTO_INCREMENT,
  gameId INT NOT NULL,
  name VARCHAR(200) NOT NULL,
  description TEXT,
  tournamentType ENUM('single_elimination', 'double_elimination', 'round_robin', 'swiss') DEFAULT 'single_elimination' NOT NULL,
  ageGroup ENUM('k_5', '6_8', '9_12', 'adult', 'all_ages', 'family') DEFAULT 'all_ages' NOT NULL,
  maxParticipants INT DEFAULT 16,
  currentParticipants INT DEFAULT 0,
  entryFee INT DEFAULT 0,
  prizePool INT DEFAULT 0,
  status ENUM('registration', 'in_progress', 'completed', 'cancelled') DEFAULT 'registration' NOT NULL,
  bracketData JSON,
  registrationDeadline TIMESTAMP NULL,
  startDate TIMESTAMP NULL,
  endDate TIMESTAMP NULL,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS game_player_stats (
  id INT PRIMARY KEY AUTO_INCREMENT,
  playerId INT NOT NULL,
  gameId INT NOT NULL,
  gamesPlayed INT DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
  gamesWon INT DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
  gamesLost INT DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
  gamesTied INT DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
  totalScore BIGINT DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
  highScore INT DEFAULT 0,
  currentStreak INT DEFAULT 0,
  bestStreak INT DEFAULT 0,
  rating INT DEFAULT 1000,
  tokensEarned INT DEFAULT 0,
  lastPlayedAt TIMESTAMP NULL,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  UNIQUE KEY unique_player_game (playerId, gameId)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS game_achievements (
  id INT PRIMARY KEY AUTO_INCREMENT,
  name VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
  description TEXT,
  gameId INT,
  achievementType ENUM('milestone', 'streak', 'skill', 'tournament', 'special') NOT NULL,
  requirement JSON,
  tokenReward INT DEFAULT 0,
  badgeIcon VARCHAR(100),
  isActive BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE NOT NULL,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS game_player_achievements (
  id INT PRIMARY KEY AUTO_INCREMENT,
  playerId INT NOT NULL,
  achievementId INT NOT NULL,
  earnedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  tokensAwarded INT DEFAULT 0,
  UNIQUE KEY unique_player_achievement (playerId, achievementId)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS trivia_categories (
  id INT PRIMARY KEY AUTO_INCREMENT,
  name VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
  slug VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL UNIQUE,
  description TEXT,
  icon VARCHAR(50),
  color VARCHAR(20),
  isActive BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE NOT NULL,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS trivia_questions (
  id INT PRIMARY KEY AUTO_INCREMENT,
  categoryId INT NOT NULL,
  question TEXT NOT NULL,
  correctAnswer TEXT NOT NULL,
  wrongAnswers JSON NOT NULL,
  difficulty ENUM('easy', 'medium', 'hard') DEFAULT 'medium' NOT NULL,
  ageGroup ENUM('k_5', '6_8', '9_12', 'adult', 'all_ages') DEFAULT 'all_ages' NOT NULL,
  explanation TEXT,
  source VARCHAR(200),
  timesAsked INT DEFAULT 0,
  timesCorrect INT DEFAULT 0,
  isActive BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE NOT NULL,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL
);
